business.name: Allentown Family Care
business.tagline: Primary care for the whole family

live_message: Patricia Goldman is on a call right now. The agent is qualifying her — new patient, switching from a closed practice, needs annual physical.
live_message_es: Patricia Goldman está en una llamada ahora mismo. El agente la está calificando — paciente nueva, cambiando de un consultorio que cerró, necesita examen físico anual.

calls.name: Patricia Goldman
calls.summary: Currently on call — new patient intake

transcript.text: Allentown Family Care, how can I help?
My doctor retired and her practice closed. I need a new primary care doctor.
We're accepting new patients. I'll help you get established. May I have your name and date of birth?
Patricia Goldman, April 22nd, 1962.
Thank you, Patricia. Are you currently on any prescriptions you'll need refilled?
Three. Blood pressure, statin, and a thyroid med.

Got it. For new patients we book a 45-minute establish-care visit so we can review meds and history before any refills. I have Dr. Patel on Thursday 11:00 AM or Dr. Kim on Tuesday 2:00 PM. Either preference?

calls.summary_long: Patricia Goldman, DOB 4/22/1962, new patient — prior PCP closed practice. On three chronic meds (BP, statin, thyroid). Routed to 45-min establish-care slot. Offering Dr. Patel Thu 11AM or Dr. Kim Tue 2PM. Call in progress.

calls.name: Anonymous caller
calls.summary: Asked which insurance plans you accept

calls.name: Hector Ramirez

transcript.text: Allentown Family Care.
Hi, I need to schedule my annual physical.
Sure. Name and date of birth, please?
Hector Ramirez, eleven sixteen, nineteen seventy-eight.
Got you, Hector. I see you're due — it's been thirteen months since your last one. You're with Dr. Kim. I have Thursday 10:00 AM or Friday 8:30 AM open. Which?
Thursday is better.
Booked. Thursday 10:00 AM with Dr. Kim, 45 minutes. Please fast for 12 hours before — we'll do blood work at the visit. Confirmation text on the way.

calls.summary_long: Hector Ramirez, DOB 11/16/1978, returning patient of Dr. Kim. Annual physical — 13 months since last (overdue by 1 month). Booked Thursday 10:00 AM, 45m, with fasting bloodwork. Pre-visit fast instructions SMS'd.

calls.name: Anonymous caller
calls.summary: Prescription refill — routed to nurse line

calls.name: Joan Kelly
calls.summary: Booked today 4:30 PM — sick visit (sore throat)

transcript.text: Allentown Family Care.
My throat has been killing me for three days and I think I have a fever now.
Sorry to hear that. Have you had a fever measured, or just feel feverish?
Hundred and one point two.
Okay — I'd recommend a same-day sick visit. Joan Kelly, right? I see you in our system.
Yes.
We have a 4:30 PM today with the on-call provider, 20 minutes. Bring your insurance card. Anything else I should flag?
I'm allergic to penicillin.
Flagged on your chart. See you at 4:30 PM.

calls.summary_long: Joan Kelly — returning patient, sore throat 3 days, temp 101.2°F. Booked same-day sick visit 4:30 PM with on-call provider (20m). Penicillin allergy reconfirmed and flagged. Insurance reminder sent.

calls.name: Elena Vasquez
calls.summary: Booked Monday 9:00 AM — well-child visit (2 kids)

calls.name: George Pham
calls.summary: Booked Tuesday 3:00 PM — blood pressure recheck
